이사야 41:1.content: “Keep silent before me, islands, and let the peoples renew their strength. Let them come near, then let them speak. Let’s meet together for judgment.

이사야 41:2.content: Who has raised up one from the east? Who called him to his foot in righteousness? He hands over nations to him and makes him rule over kings. He gives them like the dust to his sword, like the driven stubble to his bow.

이사야 41:3.content: He pursues them and passes by safely, even by a way that he had not gone with his feet.

이사야 41:4.content: Who has worked and done it, calling the generations from the beginning? I, Yahweh, the first, and with the last, I am he.”

이사야 41:5.content: The islands have seen, and fear. The ends of the earth tremble. They approach, and come.

이사야 41:6.content: Everyone helps his neighbor. They say to their brothers, “Be strong!”

이사야 41:7.content: So the carpenter encourages the goldsmith. He who smoothes with the hammer encourages him who strikes the anvil, saying of the soldering, “It is good;” and he fastens it with nails, that it might not totter.

이사야 41:8.content: “But you, Israel, my servant, Jacob whom I have chosen, the offspring of Abraham my friend,

이사야 41:9.content: You whom I have taken hold of from the ends of the earth, and called from its corners, and said to you, ‘You are my servant, I have chosen you and have not cast you away.’

이사야 41:10.content: Don’t you be afraid, for I am with you. Don’t be dismayed, for I am your God. I will strengthen you. Yes, I will help you. Yes, I will uphold you with the right hand of my righteousness.

이사야 41:11.content: Behold, all those who are incensed against you will be disappointed and confounded. Those who strive with you will be like nothing, and shall perish.

이사야 41:12.content: You will seek them, and won’t find them, even those who contend with you. Those who war against you will be as nothing, as a non-existent thing.

이사야 41:13.content: For I, Yahweh your God, will hold your right hand, saying to you, ‘Don’t be afraid. I will help you.’

이사야 41:14.content: Don’t be afraid, you worm Jacob, and you men of Israel. I will help you,” says Yahweh. “Your Redeemer is the Holy One of Israel.

이사야 41:15.content: Behold, I have made you into a new sharp threshing instrument with teeth. You will thresh the mountains, and beat them small, and will make the hills like chaff.

이사야 41:16.content: You will winnow them, and the wind will carry them away, and the whirlwind will scatter them. You will rejoice in Yahweh. You will glory in the Holy One of Israel.

이사야 41:17.content: The poor and needy seek water, and there is none. Their tongue fails for thirst. I, Yahweh, will answer them. I, the God of Israel, will not forsake them.

이사야 41:18.content: I will open rivers on the bare heights, and springs in the middle of the valleys. I will make the wilderness a pool of water, and the dry land springs of water.

이사야 41:19.content: I will put cedar, acacia, myrtle, and oil trees in the wilderness. I will set cypress trees, pine, and box trees together in the desert;

이사야 41:20.content: that they may see, know, consider, and understand together, that Yahweh’s hand has done this, and the Holy One of Israel has created it.

이사야 41:21.content: Produce your cause,” says Yahweh. “Bring out your strong reasons!” says the King of Jacob.

이사야 41:22.content: “Let them announce and declare to us what will happen! Declare the former things, what they are, that we may consider them, and know the latter end of them; or show us things to come.

이사야 41:23.content: Declare the things that are to come hereafter, that we may know that you are gods. Yes, do good, or do evil, that we may be dismayed, and see it together.

이사야 41:24.content: Behold, you are nothing, and your work is nothing. He who chooses you is an abomination.

이사야 41:25.content: “I have raised up one from the north, and he has come, from the rising of the sun, one who calls on my name, and he shall come on rulers as on mortar, and as the potter treads clay.

이사야 41:26.content: Who has declared it from the beginning, that we may know? and before, that we may say, ‘He is right?’ Surely, there is no one who declares. Surely, there is no one who shows. Surely, there is no one who hears your words.

이사야 41:27.content: I am the first to say to Zion, ‘Behold, look at them;’ and I will give one who brings good news to Jerusalem.

이사야 41:28.content: When I look, there is no man, even among them there is no counselor who, when I ask of them, can answer a word.

이사야 41:29.content: Behold, all of their deeds are vanity and nothing. Their molten images are wind and confusion.
